session.user:
Run the following command and report results: uv run pytest tests/unit/capabilities/ -v

pytest passed: 190 tests passed in 1.33s
All capabilities registration tests passed, including: - Agent capabilities (4 tests) - Base capability infrastructure (11 tests) - Code review system (15 tests) - Hooks system (22 tests) - Learned documentation (19 tests) - Managed artifacts (6 tests) - Permissions (9 tests) - Registry (14 tests) - Reminders (19 tests) - Review capability (20 tests) - Ruff format (14 tests) - Skills (7 tests) - Status line (7 tests) - Workflows (19 tests)
